stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced a new Blackwell AI chip architecture with 30% better efficiency, sparking AI hype. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting data center spending. Market psychology: FOMO driving buys, reminiscent of 2023 ChatGPT boom. Analogies: Like the GPU gold rush in crypto mining 2017, or iPhone launch catalyzing app economy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs, X sentiment 85% bullish from semantic search on 'NVDA AI chip' (20 latest posts, high engagement). Historical post-earnings jumps average 10%.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if overbought RSI>80, potential 5% pullback
